description_long: This is a small, clear plastic beverage bottle with a green screw cap and a dark liquid inside. The bottle features a contoured shape for easy gripping and a slightly indented base. The front label displays a prominent Pepsi logo with a green and red color scheme, suggesting it is a specific variant of the brand. The side and back labels contain nutritional information and branding details, with the text and graphics printed on a glossy sticker. The bottle's transparency allows the dark liquid inside to be clearly visible, and the cap appears to be made of ribbed plastic for better grip. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation on the bottle's surface.
description: A small, clear plastic bottle with a green screw cap, filled with dark liquid and featuring a Pepsi logo and branding labels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Pepsi logo prominently on the label and the green cap.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, revealing more of the side label with nutritional information and branding.
description_view_2: Back view highlights the full nutritional label and less of the main logo.
description_view_3: Opposite front view, showing the Pepsi logo and more of the label's right side.
attribute_label_or_branding: Pepsi logo with green, red, and white colors on the front label; additional branding and nutritional information on side and back labels.
